channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Sad about Dead Boy Detectives being canceled? You’ll be able to see one of the Netflix show’s stars in The Sandman season 2 instead
item.description: If you're sad about the hit Netflix show Dead Boy Detectives being canceled, then there's a special surprise for you in The Sandman season 2.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: The Last of Us Online 'was great', says former PlayStation boss, but Naughty Dog canceled it because otherwise it wouldn't have been able to make Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet
item.description: Naughty Dog couldn't have made Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet if The Last of Us Online wasn't canceled, according to former PlayStation boss Shuhei Yoshida.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Unlocking Career Growth with Six Sigma Certification
item.description: Discover the benefits and certification levels of Six Sigma, a quality management methodology that can boost your career in various industries.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Coinbase lays out legislation wish list
item.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase laid out its policy vision Wednesday, urging Congress to pass legislation that gives clarity for the digital assets industry and protects consumers.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Aryaka adds AI-powered observability to SASE platform
item.description: SASE vendor Aryaka is looking to alleviate network alert fatigue with a little help from AI. Today Aryaka announced its Winter 2025 platform update, introducing its new AI Observe tool for advanced threat detection and prevention.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 5 ways to fix OneDrive’s worst annoyances on Windows
item.description: On Windows, OneDrive is built right into the operating system. Even if you don’t turn it on, it will pop up occasionally, asking you to “back up your files to the cloud.” What that really means, of course, is that Microsoft wants you to move your folders to OneDrive. I’m not here to knock OneDrive.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Humanoid robots bust dance moves alongside humans
item.description: Unitree H1 robots dance at gala, blending AI and tradition. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the convergence of cutting-edge technology and traditional culture.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Office 2021 and 2024 cheat sheet
item.description: For decades, Microsoft Office has been the business world’s dominant productivity software suite. If you use word processing, spreadsheet, presentation, and email applications, particularly on Windows, those apps are very likely to be Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to use asyncio: Python’s built-in async library
item.description: Python’s asynchronous programming functionality, or async for short, allows you to write programs that get more work done by not waiting for independent tasks to finish. The asyncio library is a set of tools included with Python for asynchronously processing disk or network I/O.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Airbnb sues New Orleans after it adopts sweeping regulations governing short-term rentals
item.description: Airbnb is suing the City of New Orleans for requiring the company and other short-term rental platforms ensure properties they market are in compliance with city regulations.
item.dc:creator: Jack Brook, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 7 time-saving Linux commands
item.description: Some Linux commands can make your time on the command line easier and more productive. This post covers some commands that can come in very handy. 1.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The unbearable lateness of Apple Intelligence
item.description: Apple has apparently delayed what is arguably its most important Apple Intelligence feature, contextual intelligence, by at least another month. It’s the latest chapter in what history will remember as the company’s most painfully slow, yet strategically significant, introduction yet.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Key strategies for MLops success in 2025
item.description: Integrating and managing artificial intelligence and machine learning effectively within business operations has become a top priority for businesses looking to stay competitive in an ever evolving landscape.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia forges healthcare partnerships to advance AI-driven genomics, drug discovery and more
item.description: Healthcare has the most significant upside, particularly in patient care, among all the industries applicable to AI. The healthcare industry creates massive amounts of data, but much of it lives in silos.
item.dc:creator: Network World
